invariants.description: project-rules.json must be valid JSON
Split invariant config must load, merge without duplicate ids, and use only documented supported types.
tools/HME/config/rag.json must be valid JSON (successor to the mcpServers.HME block in .mcp.json after the MCP decoupling)
Bias bounds manifest must exist for Phase 3 enforcement
Pipeline main script must exist
Every shell script in scripts/ must be executable
log/ directory must exist for LIFESAVER and error logging
tmp/ directory must exist for LIFESAVER watermarks and session state
KB Lance database must exist and contain at least one data file
Top 15 highest-caller IIFE globals must each have a KB entry
KB entries must not contain LLM thinking artifact tags
KB must have been updated within the last 14 days (staleness signal)
No untracked files exist outside .gitignore  every intentional file must be committed
Claude CLI result.modelUsage[alias].contextWindow must be a number >=1000  routerClaude.ts:computeTurnUsage divides by this.
invariants.context: Claude CLI result.modelUsage[alias].contextWindow must be a number >=1000  routerClaude.ts:computeTurnUsage divides by this. If CLI version drift drops or renames the field, the context meter silently stalls and the chain mistriggers. The probe script skips when the CLI is unavailable or the API is unreachable.

invariants.description: tools/HME/scripts/hme-cli.js must prefix every stderr error line with 'hme-cli:' so PostToolUse hooks such as posttooluse_hme_review and posttooluse_addknowledge can distinguish transport failure from content.
invariants.context: tools/HME/scripts/hme-cli.js must prefix every stderr error line with 'hme-cli:' so PostToolUse hooks such as posttooluse_hme_review and posttooluse_addknowledge can distinguish transport failure from content. Drift here silently turns 'worker down' into 'operation succeeded cleanly' in nexus state.

invariants.description: llama.cpp wall-clock enforcement belongs exclusively in llamacpp_daemon.py.
invariants.context: llama.cpp wall-clock enforcement belongs exclusively in llamacpp_daemon.py. No synthesis file may (a) spawn a thread and join(timeout=) on it, or (b) urlopen a llama-server inference URL (_LLAMACPP_ARBITER_URL / _LLAMACPP_CODER_URL) directly  all inference must route through _daemon_generate. Health/probe endpoints (/health, /api/ps) are exempt since they are not inference. _cancellable_urlopen is the preemption primitive and is exempt via marker.

invariants.description: main-pipeline.js POST_COMPOSITION must wire the staleness index + coherence score so they regenerate every run
Phase 3.3  semantic drift checker + signature capture must exist
check-kb-semantic-drift.py must be present for the pipeline step to run
capture-kb-signatures.py must exist so baselines can be bootstrapped
Phase 4.1  musical ground truth correlator must exist (the external anchor)
R22 #10: fires specifically when Arc I says consensus is LOW (substrates agree) AND Arc III says drift IS DETECTED AND Arc IV says invariants healthy.
invariants.context: R22 #10: fires specifically when Arc I says consensus is LOW (substrates agree) AND Arc III says drift IS DETECTED AND Arc IV says invariants healthy. This combination means 'state has drifted but every substrate voter missed it' -- the exact hidden-drift scenario Arc III was designed for. Distinct from any single-arc invariant.

invariants.description: Phase 4.2  KB trust weight computer must exist
Phase 4.3  intention-execution gap tracker must exist
main-pipeline.js POST_COMPOSITION must run all 3 Phase 4 scripts
Phase 5.1  compositional trajectory script must exist
main-pipeline.js POST_COMPOSITION must run Phase 5 scripts (trajectory + budget)
compute-kb-trust-weights.py must unconditionally tier human_ground_truth KB entries as HIGH
reconcile-predictions.js must split predictions into clean vs injected buckets
Phase 6.2  constitutional identity derivation script must exist
Phase 6.3  doc drift detector must exist
Phase 6.4  generalization extractor must exist
main-pipeline.js POST_COMPOSITION must run Phase 6 scripts
HME Python files must use ENV (from hme_env) not raw os.environ.get for config. hme_env.py itself is exempt.
emit_review_verdict_marker must be importable from server.onboarding_chain AND produce a string containing HME_REVIEW_VERDICT for the 'clean' verdict.
invariants.context: emit_review_verdict_marker must be importable from server.onboarding_chain AND produce a string containing HME_REVIEW_VERDICT for the 'clean' verdict. Guards against signature drift that the pattern-in-file check can't catch  the function must actually work, not just exist.

invariants.description: tools/HME/KB/code_chunks.lance/_deletions/ must have at most 50 files. Above this threshold, dead arrow files slow table opens and waste disk. Run `python3 tools/HME/scripts/compact-lance-tables.py` to compact.
invariants.context: tools/HME/KB/code_chunks.lance/_deletions/ must have at most 50 files. Above this threshold, dead arrow files slow table opens and waste disk. Run `python3 tools/HME/scripts/compact-lance-tables.py` to compact. This count grows on every re-index cycle (delete old chunks + add new) and needs periodic compaction.

invariants.description: tools/HME/scripts/hme-cli.js must declare a CLI_VERSION constant and emit it in --version output. Allows version mismatch detection between old wrappers and new worker deployments.
KB lance tables (tools/HME/KB/*.lance/) are ephemeral generated state  regenerated by rag_engines indexing and compacted by tools/HME/scripts/compact-lance-tables.py.
invariants.context: KB lance tables (tools/HME/KB/*.lance/) are ephemeral generated state  regenerated by rag_engines indexing and compacted by tools/HME/scripts/compact-lance-tables.py. Their _deletions/, _transactions/, _versions/, and data/ internals must not be tracked by git. Tracking them produces gigabytes of binary drift per indexer run and breaks patch-based commit tools (GitLens) with 'cannot apply binary patch without full index line' errors. If this invariant fails, the fix is: add to .gitignore, then `git rm --cached -r tools/HME/KB/<table>.lance`.

invariants.description: Every sketch in lab/sketches.js must declare a patches: [] array listing globals it monkey-patches in postBoot(). Enforced by lab/run.js at sketch load time.
invariants.context: Every sketch in lab/sketches.js must declare a patches: [] array listing globals it monkey-patches in postBoot(). Enforced by lab/run.js at sketch load time. Ensures patches are declared, auditable, and cleaned up between sketches.

invariants.description: New invariants must cite born_from unless their id is in the legacy uncited baseline.
invariants.born_from: 2026-05-16 invariant cleanup: prevent adding new uncited invariants while legacy ids migrate
